UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1112. THE ONLY DOCUMENT FILED PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1112(A) APPEARS TO BE POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, NO NOTICE OF MOTION OR MOTION COMPLIANT WITH CRC 3.1112(D) WAS FILED. ADDITIONALLY, NO PROOF OF SERVICE BY ACTUAL SERVER WAS PROVIDED. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF RAYMOND CHOY'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 31, 2013 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 10, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RAYMOND CHOY'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS Continued to December 31, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendants' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alden J. Knisbacher, Esq. (415-522-5200) for Carole Robertson and Eugene Robertson, Defendants and moving parties

Court clarifies and adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendants' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1112. The only document filed pursuant to CRC 3.1112(a) appears to be points and authorities, no Notice of Motion or Motion compliant with CRC 3.1112(d) was filed. Additionally, no proof of service by actual server was provided. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
